title: DPS Bow Craft (Obliterator / Warmonger)
goal: Endgame DPS bow with T3+ % physical damage, flat physical damage from omen-greater-exaltation, and runes for the final flat push. Base-flexible: works on either Obliterator or Warmonger Bow.

baseRequirements.hint: Find a 2-mod rare base where one of the mods is % Increased Physical Damage at T3 or better (~135%+). If the base only has 1 mod, use a Perfect Orb of Augmentation first so you start with 2 mods.

steps.title: Slam your prefix anchor essence (base-dependent)
steps.description:
Use the essence that matches your base:

• Obliterator Bow → Greater Essence of Seeking (crit suffix — critical for this craft)
• Warmonger Bow → Greater Essence of Abrasion (flat physical prefix)

If your base started with only one mod, apply a Perfect Orb of Augmentation BEFORE the essence so you end up with 3 mods including the essence-forced one.

branches.message: Use Greater Essence of Seeking. The Critical Hit Chance roll is what makes this base shine.
Use Greater Essence of Abrasion to lock in flat physical.

steps.title: Bone slam: Dextral Necromancy + Omen of the Liege + Preserved Jawbone
steps.description:
Stack:
• Omen of Dextral Necromancy (forces SUFFIX from the bone)
• Omen of the Liege (no junk — guaranteed valuable mod)
• Preserved Jawbone

This fills a suffix slot with a strong rolled mod.

steps.title: Well of Souls — bias unveil toward Attack Speed
steps.description: Activate The Well of Souls with Attack Speed as the target tag. This biases the next abyss/desecration roll to land on attack speed, giving you the second key suffix.

steps.title: Greater Exalt with Omen of Greater Exaltation → flat damage
steps.description: Omen of Greater Exaltation + Greater Exalted Orb. This consumes a prefix slot and lands a flat damage mod (the bow's biggest dps lever).

steps.title: Add 2 sockets and apply Greater Iron Runes
steps.description: Artificer Orb to open 2 sockets if not already present. Apply Greater Iron Rune in each — adds flat physical damage. Final DPS push that pushes you over the listing breakpoint.

pricingTips: Total DPS → list at the actual rolled value.
Physical DPS → list at the actual rolled value.
Critical Hit Chance → list a touch below the actual roll, or list both with a middle-ground asking price.
notes: Watch your base: Obliterator wants the Seeking essence, Warmonger wants Abrasion. Wrong essence = bricked craft.
Step 2 The Well of Souls is interchangeable with Crit Damage Bonus if you prefer that suffix — adjust to the build buying it.
Skip step 4 if your bow already prices well without runes — runes cost less than the DPS they add.
